# [Clang] Assertion `isa<LabelDecl>(D) && "declaration not instantiated in this scope"` with nested lambda since 5.0

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176088

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 5.0 with `-std=c++17` flag.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/8sM53E19c

This one have same assertion and similar stack dump like #175424.
But #175424 goes back to 10.0, using template and requires. 
Feel free to close it if it's a dup.


## Program
```cpp
auto f = [] {
  int a; 
  auto g = [](auto v) {
    {
      struct Nested {
        constexpr int value = v;
      };
      return Nested::value;
    }
  };
  g(a);
};
```

## Stack Dump
```bash
<source>:6:9: error: non-static data member cannot be constexpr; did you intend to make it static?
    6 |         constexpr int value = v;
      |         ^
      |         static 
<source>:6:23: error: static data member 'value' not allowed in local struct 'Nested'
    6 |         constexpr int value = v;
      |                       ^
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/Sema/SemaTemplateInstantiate.cpp:4632: llvm::PointerUnion<clang::Decl*, llvm::SmallVector<clang::ValueDecl*, 4>*>* clang::LocalInstantiationScope::findInstantiationOf(const clang::Decl*): Assertion `isa<LabelDecl>(D) && "declaration not instantiated in this scope"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

```cpp
auto f = [] {
```
